stemHtml: Once a pilot has developed a certain way of thinking about a problem, he/she will probably find it..

options.a: easy to interpret the data in different ways.
options.b: difficult to stick to his/her interpretation of the data.
options.c: difficult to get out of that way of thinking and try a different interpretation of the data.
options.d: impossible to get out of that way of thinking, whatever happens.
